content.text:
## Findings

1. The subprocess spawner is runAgentTest in tests/helpers/session-runner.ts:241 — it spawns `claude -p` and returns a structured SkillTestResult.
2. The deterministic detection scorer is outcomeJudge in tests/helpers/llm-judge.ts:150 — it counts detected/missed from ground-truth.json with no LLM call.
3. The free structural validator is tests/static-gate.test.ts — it walks every fixture and rubric on disk and asserts the invariants.

Each answer is grounded in the cited file:line.
